name: Kolatchkies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until soft, except for the Solo filling.
2. Refrigerate the dough until firm.
3. Roll out the dough to 1/8 inch thick and cut into 2-inch squares.
4. Place half a teaspoon of Solo filling in the center of each square.
5. Seal by pinching two opposite sides together.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 18-20 minutes, or until light brown.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
